title: LabResult
description: A single parsed laboratory test result row

test_date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. Resolved from report date if not per-row.

test_name.description: Lab test name as it appears in the report. Required.

test_value.description: Numeric or text result value. Empty string allowed.

unit.description: Measurement unit (e.g. mg/dL, g/dL). Empty string if not present.

reference_range.description: Normal reference range as printed (e.g. 13.0 - 17.5). Empty string if not present.

is_abnormal.description: True if marked H, HH, L, LL or value is outside reference range.

lab_name.description: Laboratory facility name. Empty string if not visible.
